title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 04 April 2025
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 04 April 2025
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 04 April 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 05/04/2025
The ship recycling market remained relatively quiet this week, with activity slowing down in several key destinations due to holidays. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2025-04-05_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-29-March-04-April-2025_compressed.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2025-04-05_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-29-March-04-April-2025_compressed.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
29 March - 04 April 2025
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
The ship recycling market remained relatively quiet this week, with activity slowing down in several key destinations due to holidays. India showed slight
improvement, supported by local demand and a more stable tone, further backed by recent GST clarity on domestic vessels.
